title: Tangy Chewy Argentinian Haricot Beans Stir-fry
description: A tangy and chewy meal-prep Argentinean dish featuring gluten-free haricot beans that can be prepared in advance for easy lunches or dinners.

ingredients.name: 500g Haricot Beans
ingredients.notes: Soak haricot beans overnight for easier cooking

instructions: Preheat your wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in chopped bell peppers and cook for about 2 minutes.
Drain soaked haricot beans (if not already cooked), add to the pan with the vegetables, and stir well.
Pour in lime juice and white vinegar, bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low, cover the wok/pan, and let it cook for 5 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, remove from heat and serve warm or at room temperature.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
